name: MCP4728 Component
description: The MCP4728 output component allows to use [12bit external quad DAC](https://www.adafruit.com/product/4470) in order to have analog outputs on any board by using [I²C](https://esphome.io/components/i2c). Devices default address is `0x60`.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: Manually specify the I2C address of the DAC. Defaults to `0x60`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this output component.

config_entries.label: Store In Eeprom
config_entries.description: Use SEQ_WRITE mode to also write to EEPROM sequentially. Defaults to `false`.
